Package org.apache.juneau.rest.server.springboot

Class SpringBeanStore

java.lang.Object
org.apache.juneau.commons.inject.BasicBeanStore
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.springboot.SpringBeanStore
All Implemented Interfaces:
AutoCloseable, BeanStore, WritableBeanStore
public class SpringBeanStore extends BasicBeanStore
A bean store that uses Spring bean resolution to find beans if they're not already in this store.

This implementation extends BasicBeanStore and delegates to Spring's ApplicationContext for bean resolution when beans are not found in the local store or parent stores.

Example:

// Create a Spring bean store ApplicationContext appContext = ...; SpringBeanStore beanStore = new SpringBeanStore(appContext, null); // Get bean from Spring context Optional<MyService> service = beanStore.getBean(MyService.class); // Get named bean from Spring context Optional<MyService> namedService = beanStore.getBean(MyService.class, "primary"); // Get all beans of a type from Spring context Map<String, MyService> allServices = beanStore.getBeansOfType(MyService.class);

See Also:
  • juneau-rest-server-springboot Basics
  • BasicBeanStore
  • BeanStore

  • Constructor Details

    • SpringBeanStore

      public SpringBeanStore(org.springframework.context.ApplicationContext appContext, BeanStore parent)
      Constructor.

      If appContext is non-null, this constructor also installs a SpringEnvironmentPropertySource on the process-wide Settings singleton so that @Value("{...}") placeholders resolve against the Spring Environment (i.e. against application.yaml, env vars, system properties, etc.). The source is removed by clear().

      Parameters:
      appContext - The Spring application context used to resolve beans. Can be null.
      parent - The parent bean store. Can be null.

  • Method Details

    • clear

      public SpringBeanStore clear()
      Description copied from class: BasicBeanStore
      Removes all beans from this store.

      This operation only affects this store and does not affect the parent bean store.

      Specified by:
      clear in interface WritableBeanStore
      Overrides:
      clear in class BasicBeanStore
      Returns:
      This object.

    • getBean

      public <T> Optional<T> getBean(Class<T> beanType)
      Description copied from class: BasicBeanStore
      Returns the unnamed bean of the specified type.

      If no unnamed bean is found in this store, searches the parent store recursively.

      Specified by:
      getBean in interface BeanStore
      Overrides:
      getBean in class BasicBeanStore
      Type Parameters:
      T - The type of bean to return.
      Parameters:
      beanType - The type of bean to return.
      Returns:
      The bean, or Optional.empty() if not found.

    • getBean

      public <T> Optional<T> getBean(Class<T> beanType, String name)
      Description copied from class: BasicBeanStore
      Returns the named bean of the specified type.

      If no bean with the specified name is found in this store, searches the parent store recursively.

      Specified by:
      getBean in interface BeanStore
      Overrides:
      getBean in class BasicBeanStore
      Type Parameters:
      T - The type of bean to return.
      Parameters:
      beanType - The type of bean to return.
      name - The bean name. Can be null.
      Returns:
      The bean, or Optional.empty() if not found.

    • getBeansOfType

      public <T> Map<String,T> getBeansOfType(Class<T> beanType)
      Description copied from class: BasicBeanStore
      Returns all beans of the specified type, keyed by bean name.

      The map keys are the bean names (empty string for unnamed beans), and the values are the bean instances. Results from the parent store are included first, then beans from this store (which override parent beans with the same name).

      Specified by:
      getBeansOfType in interface BeanStore
      Overrides:
      getBeansOfType in class BasicBeanStore
      Type Parameters:
      T - The bean type.
      Parameters:
      beanType - The bean type.
      Returns:
      A map of bean names to bean instances. Never null.

    • hasBean

      public boolean hasBean(Class<?> beanType)
      Description copied from class: BasicBeanStore
      Returns true if this store contains at least one unnamed bean of the specified type.

      If not found in this store, searches the parent store recursively.

      Specified by:
      hasBean in interface BeanStore
      Overrides:
      hasBean in class BasicBeanStore
      Parameters:
      beanType - The bean type to check.
      Returns:
      true if this store contains at least one unnamed bean of the specified type.

    • hasBean

      public boolean hasBean(Class<?> beanType, String name)
      Description copied from class: BasicBeanStore
      Returns true if this store contains a bean of the specified type and name.

      If not found in this store, searches the parent store recursively.

      Specified by:
      hasBean in interface BeanStore
      Overrides:
      hasBean in class BasicBeanStore
      Parameters:
      beanType - The bean type to check.
      name - The bean name. Can be null.
      Returns:
      true if this store contains a bean of the specified type and name.

    • getBeanSupplier

      public <T> Optional<Supplier<T>> getBeanSupplier(Class<T> beanType)
      Description copied from class: BasicBeanStore
      Returns the supplier for an unnamed bean of the specified type.

      If no supplier is found in this store, searches the parent store recursively.

      Specified by:
      getBeanSupplier in interface BeanStore
      Overrides:
      getBeanSupplier in class BasicBeanStore
      Type Parameters:
      T - The bean type.
      Parameters:
      beanType - The bean type.
      Returns:
      The supplier, or Optional.empty() if no supplier of the specified type exists.

    • getBeanSupplier

      public <T> Optional<Supplier<T>> getBeanSupplier(Class<T> beanType, String name)
      Description copied from class: BasicBeanStore
      Returns the supplier for a named bean of the specified type.

      If no supplier with the specified name is found in this store, searches the parent store recursively.

      Specified by:
      getBeanSupplier in interface BeanStore
      Overrides:
      getBeanSupplier in class BasicBeanStore
      Type Parameters:
      T - The bean type.
      Parameters:
      beanType - The bean type.
      name - The bean name. Can be null.
      Returns:
      The supplier, or Optional.empty() if no supplier of the specified type and name exists.
